headline: Axtria Ignite 2026: 450+ Life Sciences Leaders Convene With a Contrarian Message -- Fix the Foundation Before You Scale AI
summary: Axtria Inc., a global leader in AI-first data & analytics solutions and platforms for the life sciences industry, hosted Axtria Ignite 2026 on June 10 and 11 at the Princeton Marriott at Forrestal under the theme "Industrializing Intelligence: The Agentic Enterprise." More than 450 executives from over 100 leading life sciences, MedTech, and biotech organizations gathered to work through the harder question of 2026: what must be true before an enterprise can trust AI to run at machine speed.
